verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In this world full of broken dreams A ray of hope shines through It shines beyond the pain and wants It shines for me and you In this world where people weak And living fear and madness There's hope beyond this sadness Through the power of God's word.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: God's Word Hope for all mankind Sight to all the blind It's joy to those despairing It's loving and it's caring It sets our spirit free God's word is hope eternally.
